mapper.select: SELECT id, version, name, completion_count, archived, longest_streak, current_streak, last_completed_at, created_at, scheduled_days FROM habits WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO habits ( name, scheduled_days, completion_count, archived, longest_streak, current_streak, last_completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{scheduledDays, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.nantonijevic.habits.repository.DayOfWeekSetTypeHandler}, #{completionCount}, #{archived}, #{longestStreak}, #{currentStreak}, #{lastCompletedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE habits SET name = #{name}, scheduled_days = #{scheduledDays, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.nantonijevic.habits.repository.DayOfWeekSetTypeHandler}, completion_count = #{completionCount}, archived = #{archived}, longest_streak = #{longestStreak}, current_streak = #{currentStreak}, last_completed_at = #{lastCompletedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
